title: SupportKnowledgeBaseArticle
description: Represents a knowledge base or help center article used by support teams and customers for self-service.

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base article.

title.description: Title of the article shown in the help center.

slug.description: URL-safe slug used to address the article.

body.description: Full HTML or Markdown body of the article.
body.example: Follow these steps to reset your password...

summary.description: Short summary used in listings and search results.
summary.example: Step-by-step guide to resetting your account password.

category_id.description: Identifier of the category or section the article belongs to.

tags.description: Tags applied to the article for search and grouping.

author_id.description: Identifier of the author of the article.

view_count.description: Number of times the article has been viewed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the article was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update to the article.
